---
title: ""
---

::: {.section-card .contact-links}
# Contact

I’d be happy to connect about opportunities, projects, or anything related to data science, analytics, finance, or research.

<p>
<i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
<a href="mailto:chanvictoriavivian@gmail.com">chanvictoriavivian@gmail.com</a>
</p>

<p>
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/victoria-vivian-chan/" target="_blank">
Victoria Vivian Chan
</a>
</p>

<p>
<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-person"></i>
<a href="resume.pdf" target="_blank">Resume</a>
</p>
:::
